Anomaly Tier
Sort Table
Detection Logic
Flag when: (Score Z≥2 or Score≥95th%) AND time>0 AND (Time Z≤−1.5 or Time≤20th%)

Anom. score = 0.40×Z(eff) + 0.35×Z(sc) + 0.25×(−Z(tm))

Tiers within flagged: top 10%→Critical · 10–30%→High · rest→Medium
Combined = worst tier across all 5 dimensions
